aeo_readiness.summary: The business is not optimized for AI search, making it unlikely for AI assistants to cite or recommend them. Their content lacks the necessary depth and structured data for AI models to recognize them as a credible source.
quick_wins: Expand content to include detailed service explanations and conversational FAQs

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not optimized and is currently invisible to Google AI, severely limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: Missing photos, posts, and Q&A engagement

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected, ensuring accurate business information across platforms.
action_items: Expand NAP citations to additional local directories

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service processes

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and detailed service information
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and solution-based searches
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness schema and expanding service pages with conversational content
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as local HVAC experts by showcasing certifications, customer testimonials, and detailed project walkthroughs

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for local HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is not found, and their website lacks the structured data needed for AI recognition.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, GBP optimization, and conversational content to ensure AI models cite and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimized for AI are already capturing your potential market share. Act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your Path to HVAC Authority
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI and capture more local HVAC leads.
business_name: Attic Brothers LLC Heating & Air Conditioning
